metadata.title: Backup Service (Veeam Backup and Replication) Component

components.title: Backup Service (Veeam Backup and Replication)
components.description: Veeam Backup and Replication providing backup, recovery, and replication services for organisation virtual machines (VMware vSphere / Hyper-V), physical servers, and cloud workloads. Veeam performs image-level backups, application-aware processing (SQL Server, Active Directory, Exchange), and immutable backups to a hardened Linux-based Veeam Hardened Repository. Backups are encrypted with AES-256.

props.name: version
props.value: Veeam Backup and Replication v12 or later

props.name: backup-targets
props.value: Veeam Hardened Repository (on-premises), Azure Blob immutable storage (cloud copy)

props.name: encryption
props.value: AES-256 backup file encryption with key managed in Veeam configuration database

protocols.name: https
protocols.title: HTTPS — Veeam ONE monitoring console and Veeam Backup Enterprise Manager

protocols.name: veeam-console
protocols.title: Veeam Backup Console — Veeam Backup and Replication management console connection

protocols.name: veeam-transport
protocols.title: Veeam Data Mover — Backup data transfer between Veeam components

port-ranges.remarks: Default Veeam data mover range — restrict to Veeam infrastructure IPs

protocols.name: smb
protocols.title: SMB — Backup file access and repository share (if SMB repository is used)

protocols.name: ssh
protocols.title: SSH — Veeam Linux proxy and hardened repository management

protocols.name: syslog
protocols.title: Syslog — Veeam job and security event forwarding to SIEM

protocols.name: vmware-vsphere
protocols.title: VMware vSphere API — VM backup via vCenter and VADP

control-implementations.description: Control implementations for Backup Service (Veeam Backup and Replication).

implemented-requirements.description: Veeam performs daily incremental and weekly full backups of all critical virtual machines and physical servers. Backup jobs are monitored via Veeam ONE or email alerts, and backup failures are escalated to the operations team within one hour of detection. Backup success rates and coverage are reported in the monthly operations review.

Veeam backup chains (full + incremental) are retained as complete, self-contained restore points enabling point-in-time recovery. Application-aware processing ensures SQL Server transaction logs, Active Directory VSS writers, and Exchange VSS writers are quiesced consistently during backup, enabling a consistent point-in-time restore.

All Veeam backup files are encrypted at rest using AES-256 encryption configured in Veeam Backup Job settings. Backup encryption keys are managed by the Veeam configuration database (itself backed up separately and encrypted). Backups stored on the Veeam Hardened Repository use immutable storage (Veeam's Linux hardened repository with immutability flag) to protect against ransomware encryption.

Veeam security events (backup job success/failure, repository access events, configuration changes, restore operations, and administrative access to the Veeam console) are forwarded to the SIEM. Unexpected restore operations or configuration changes outside maintenance windows trigger security alerts.
